title: Hair Advisor
description:
Responsibilities

  • Boosting sales revenue and profitability by achieving sales targets
  • Serving Customer with professionalism
  • Recommend packages according to individual needs and conditions
  • Conduct professional scalp analysis; demonstrate features and benefits of company’s treatments, services and products
  • Fix appointment, follow-up through reminder calls, and ensure customer visits the outlet
  • Update clients records in the system
  • Constantly educate customers on the necessity and benefits of company’s treatments, services and products
  • Building rapports with customer and providing good customer service and needs in relation to hair scalp enquiries
  • Perform basic hands-on treatments when necessary
  • Complete daily sales report and povide administrative support for the outlet manager
  • Collection and organization of client cards. Updating of customer’s progress in the treatment card and computer system
  • Handle and manage customer feedback (complaints & queries)
  • Support the outlet manager in coordinating stock ordering, repairing equipment, store maintenance etc.
  • Assist in stock take as required on a rotational basis

Requirements

  • Experience and competent in sales with minimum 2 year of relevant experience in the beauty industry
  • Bilingual and Excellent communication skills
  • 6 day work week including weekends and PH (Compulsory to work on weekends & PH)
  • Sensitive to customers’ needs and pay attention to details
  • Strong sense of responsibility and urgency
  • Ability to work under pressure in a fast pace working environment
  • Able to work on retail hours, weekend and public holiday
  • Be self-motivated; high stress tolerance
  • Good team player

postedCompany.description:
PHS HAIRSCIENCE is a leader in the world of premium trichology. Founded in Singapore in 2006, PHS HAIRSCIENCE was born out of the quest to deliver the promise of healthy scalp and beautfiul hair. 

With the development of a revolutionary new concept in scalp and hair treatments and products, PHS HAIRSCIENCE has successfully found a harmonious balance between the wonders of nature and the precision of cutting-edge technology to provide Premium Trichology through Professional Holistic Solutions. 

Since its inception, PHS HAIRSCIENCE has administered over 10,000 treatment programmes and cultivated a wealth of experience in formulating products and treatments targeted at Asian scalp. Over the years, PHS HAIRSCIENCE has garnered awards and recognition from beauty experts, leading international beauty publications as well as government agencies for providing customers with the ultimate solution to their scalp and hair needs. 

Moving forward, PHS HAIRSCIENCE aims to expand towards global platform and bring new innovations and solutions to the world of trichology.
postedCompany.name: REVAMP INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.
